mapper.sql: id, subject_id, question_type, title, options_json, answer_json, analysis, score, difficulty, knowledge_point, creator_id, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: select from question where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into question(subject_id, question_type, title, options_json, answer_json, analysis, score, difficulty, knowledge_point, creator_id, create_time, update_time, deleted) values (#{subjectId}, #{questionType}, #{title}, #{optionsJson}, #{answerJson}, #{analysis}, #{score}, #{difficulty}, #{knowledgePoint}, #{creatorId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: update question set subject_id = #{subjectId}, question_type = #{questionType}, title = #{title}, options_json = #{optionsJson}, answer_json = #{answerJson}, analysis = #{analysis}, score = #{score}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, knowledge_point = #{knowledgePoint}, creator_id = #{creatorId}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
update question set deleted = 1, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select from question where deleted = 0 and id in
#{id}
select distinct q. from question q inner join student_answer sa on q.id = sa.question_id and sa.deleted = 0 where q.deleted = 0 and sa.student_id = #{studentId} and ifnull(sa.correct_flag, 0) = 0
